description_long: This is a small, rectangular black flag attached to a slender vertical pole. The flag features a prominent white circular emblem in its center, composed of interlocking rings forming a geometric pattern. The pole is topped with a rounded finial and appears to be made of metal or painted wood. The flag itself is likely made of fabric, with a smooth, matte finish and no visible text or additional symbols. The design is minimalistic and modern, with a strong contrast between the black background and the white emblem. The overall appearance suggests it could represent an organization, event, or be used as a decorative urban marker.
description: A black flag with a white geometric emblem, mounted on a slender vertical pole with a rounded finial. The design is minimalistic and modern.
description_view_0: The flag is fully visible with its white circular emblem centered on a black background, attached to a vertical pole.
description_view_1: Only the thin edge of the flag and the pole are visible, making the flag itself nearly invisible from this angle.
description_view_2: The flag and emblem are visible from the opposite side, similar to view 0, with the pole on the right.
description_view_3: The flag is edge-on, showing only the thin profile of the pole and flag, with minimal flag surface visible.
attribute_flag_design: A black rectangular flag with a central white geometric emblem consisting of interlocking rings, no text or additional symbols, and a strong contrast between the black field and white design.
